summary: Comprehensive testing of Rheinzelmänner app after performance optimizations. Backend: 24/25 tests passed (health endpoint not exposed via ingress - expected). Frontend: All pages and features working correctly. Performance optimizations verified: MongoDB aggregation pipelines, DB indexes, React.lazy code splitting, useMemo for statistics, debounced idle timer.

minor.issue: Health endpoint returns frontend HTML instead of JSON - not exposed through ingress (internal endpoint only)

issues: Hydration warnings about <span> inside <option>/<select> elements - cosmetic issue, no functional impact

seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up automatically via pytest fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: All performance optimizations verified working. Key tests: 1) Fine type update bug fix verified (space in query key fixed), 2) Statistics endpoint uses MongoDB aggregation pipelines, 3) Personal statistics uses aggregation, 4) All CRUD operations working, 5) Code splitting with React.lazy working, 6) Fiscal year selector works on Dashboard/Fines/Statistics pages, 7) QR dialogs open correctly, 8) Logout redirects to login page.

backend: GET /api/fine-types - returns fine type list (6 types)
PUT /api/fine-types/{id} - BUG FIX VERIFIED: update works correctly
GET /api/fines?fiscal_year=2025/2026 - returns fines sorted by date desc (24 fines)
POST /api/fines - creates fine without date (uses current date)
POST /api/fines - creates fine with retroactive date (correct fiscal year)
POST /api/users - creates user with password policy
frontend: Login page - credentials work (admin/admin123)
Dashboard - Sau/Lämmchen/Ranking/Recent Fines sections display correctly
Dashboard - Fiscal year selector works
Dashboard - QR Scan button opens scanner dialog
Dashboard - Add Fine button opens fine dialog
Members page - Lists 9 members with Aktiv/Passiv status
Members page - Archive section shows 4 archived members
Members page - Add member button works
Members page - Sort selector works
Members page - QR Code dialog shows member QR code
Fine Types page - Lists 6 fine types
Fine Types page - Add/Edit/Delete buttons work
Fines page - Lists 24 fines for 2025/2026
Fines page - Fiscal year selector works
Fines page - Add fine button works
Statistics page - KPI cards show correct values (514.86€, 24 fines, 21.45€ avg, 4 members)
Statistics page - Top 10 bar chart renders
Statistics page - Pie chart renders (fine types distribution)
Statistics page - Monthly line chart renders
Statistics page - Active/Passive member rankings display
User Management page - Lists 4 users with roles
User Management page - Add/Edit/Delete/Reset password buttons work
Audit Logs page - Shows 354 entries with stats
Audit Logs page - Search and filter work
Navigation menu - All links work
Logout - Redirects to login page
Code splitting - Pages load lazily without errors

performance_optimizations_verified.mongodb_aggregation_pipelines: Statistics endpoint uses $match, $group, $sort pipeline - verified working
performance_optimizations_verified.db_indexes: Indexes created on startup for users, members, fines, fine_types, audit_logs collections
performance_optimizations_verified.react_lazy_code_splitting: All pages use React.lazy with Suspense fallback - verified loading
performance_optimizations_verified.usememo_statistics: Statistics.js uses useMemo for fineTypeStats, monthlyStats, activeMembersRanking, passiveMembersRanking, avgFine
performance_optimizations_verified.debounced_idle_timer: AuthContext uses 2s debounce for activity tracking, 15min idle timeout, 8hr absolute timeout

bug_fix_verified.fine_type_update: PUT /api/fine-types/{id} - Fixed query key from ' id' to 'id' - update now works correctly
